channel.title: Posts on Michael Trainor
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Michael Trainor

item.title: Jack of all trades. Master of none. Sort of...
item.description:
After more than a decade serving various roles in numerous game development studios, technology companies, and flight simulation vendors, I find myself living in the most southern capital city on the planet…making movies, but not quite. I write software and develop pipeline architecture for data. In this case, it’s heaps of simluations, art content, video, and blah blah blah. It’s my day job, and I love it.

I don’t spend much time blogging or posting my personal projects, but I think it’s time I started at least sharing…even it’s for my own benefit.

See, I have no discipline when it comes to completing my personal projects. I never finish anything that I’m not getting paid to do. It’s been frustrating. I spend quite alot of my free time digging into tutorials, UDemy course, and generally tinkering with whatever software I can get my mitts on. I recently drop some hard earned cash on my own licenses for SideFX Houdini and a Unity. It’s time to make it worth it.
